ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal where the publication is published */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "online_date" TEXT /* Date the publication became available online */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., draft, published, withdrawn) */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources for the research */,
  "research_domains" TEXT /* Research domains of the publication */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the publication is released */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of the article (e.g., research article, review, editorial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "impact_factor_year" INTEGER /* Year of the impact factor */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the journal is open access */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the journal's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the author is affiliated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "rankings" TEXT /* Rankings or accreditations of the institution */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-author relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the author is the corresponding author */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Author's contribution to the publication */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Author's affiliation at the time of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_text" TEXT /* Text of the keyword */,
  "keyword_type" TEXT /* Type of the keyword (e.g., MeSH, free text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_keywords" (
  "publication_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-keyword relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_keywords_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_keywords_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "citing_publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that cites another publication */,
  "cited_publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the cited publication is cited */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation is made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., citations, downloads, views) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., Google Scholar, Web of Science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_metrics_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
